ddls:
CREATE TABLE "feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the counties table */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the feed */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the feed (e.g., Aviation) */,
  "listeners" INTEGER /* Number of listeners currently tuned in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feed (e.g., Online, Offline) */,
  "links" TEXT /* Links associated with the feed (e.g., website, social media) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feed was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feed was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feed */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image representing the feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feeds_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_genre_map" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the feeds table */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the feed_genres table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_listeners" (
  "listener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listener record */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the feeds table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "listen_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user started listening to the feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listener_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
